conditions.critical_condition_basis: retention volume does not change with molar mass

field_evidence.critical_condition_basis: At a solvent oxide) composition of THF/hexane = 71:29% by weight, 2 0 = 514 nm = 514 nm in the retention volume does not change with molar mass.
field_evidence.critical_component: CAP of PEO-MA macromonomers was reached
field_evidence.column_name: A chromatographic phenogel (linear, _d_ p = 10 m, 7.8 × 300 mm) column was packed with the styrene/divinylbenzene gel.
field_evidence.mobile_phase_solvents: Mixtures of analytical grade THF (Merck, Darmstadt, Germany) and _n_ -hexane (Lachema, Brno, Czech Republic)
field_evidence.temperature_celsius: The temperature during all experiments was maintained at 30°C

conditions.notes: Critical condition established for PEO-MA macromonomers to analyze polystyrene-graft-poly(ethylene oxide) copolymers. The PEO side chains are at the critical point, making them chromatographically invisible, while the PS backbone is separated by SEC.
conditions.physical_address: Polymer Institute, Slovak Academy of Sciences, Du´ bravska´ cesta 9, 842 36 Bratislava, Slovakia

conditions.critical_condition_basis: The data obtained by LC CAP (the apparent molecular weights of the polystyrene backbone, the number of the grafts per unit backbone and the amount of poly(ethylene oxide) in the graft copolymers) were compared with results of static light scattering (SLS), differential refractometry and conventional SEC.

field_evidence.critical_condition_basis: The data obtained by LC CAP (the apparent molecular weights of the polystyrene backbone, the number of the grafts per unit backbone and the amount of poly(ethylene oxide) in the graft copolymers) were compared with results of static light scattering (SLS), differential refractometry and conventional SEC.
field_evidence.critical_component: The side chain of a graft copolymer eluted at CAP the main polystyrene chain could be characterized on the basis of the SEC mechanism.
field_evidence.column_name: A chromatographic phenogel (linear, d p = 10 m, 7.8 × 300 mm) column was packed with the styrene/divinylbenzene gel.
field_evidence.mobile_phase_solvents: Mixtures of analytical grade THF (Merck, Darmstadt, Germany) and n-hexane (Lachema, Brno, Czech Republic), both purified by distillation, were used as mobile phases.
field_evidence.mobile_phase_ratio: At a solvent oxide) composition of THF/hexane = 71:29% by weight, 2 0 = 514 nm = 514 nm in the retention volume does not change with molar mass.
field_evidence.temperature_celsius: The temperature during all experiments was maintained at 30°C with a Knauer column oven.
field_evidence.pore_size: A chromatographic phenogel (linear, d p = 10 m, 7.8 × 300 mm) column was packed with the styrene/divinylbenzene gel.
field_evidence.flow_rate: The data were collected on-line using a Waters PC-based data acquisition system.

conditions.notes: Critical condition established for poly(ethylene oxide) side chains in polystyrene-graft-poly(ethylene oxide) copolymers. The PEO side chains are at the critical point, making them chromatographically invisible, while the PS backbone is separated by SEC.
conditions.physical_address: Polymer Institute, Slovak Academy of Sciences, Du´ bravska´ cesta 9, 842 36 Bratislava, Slovakia
